title: Add a Building
description: Name the building and set its floors so its bills can be raised.

steps.title: Building name
steps.description: Each building is priced on its own.
steps.voiceScript: Name the building. Each building is priced separately.
steps.captionText: Name the building. Each building is priced separately.
steps.fallbackMessage: Building name: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Floors
steps.description: Floors carry the service bills you will price.
steps.voiceScript: Set the floors. Each floor carries the service bills you will price.
steps.captionText: Set the floors. Each floor carries the service bills you will price.
steps.fallbackMessage: Floors: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create the building
steps.description: The next screen lets you add its floors and bills.
steps.voiceScript: Create the building, then add its floors and service bills.
steps.captionText: Create the building, then add its floors and service bills.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create the building: not visible on this screen yet.
